section_1_demonstrated: Z_active semantics works: every cycle's z_active is reduced by applying a SummaryEvent while z_total is preserved; conservation invariant holds on both 500-row replays with audit_flags=[].
Summaries preserve Z_total and reduce Z_active: A 105 summaries -> z_active 34.75/151.40; B 130 summaries -> z_active 22.30/144.40; archived buffer rows remain recoverable.

PotentialOmega surrogate signals reproduce across A and B: 49+76 signals all advisory_only=True; common buckets include trust_hierarchy::factual, macp_pipeline::factual, security_boundary::security_boundary, unsafe_memory::security_boundary, general::factual.
Surrogate temporal rule passes on every candidate bucket: commit 11 verdict ISOLATED_RULE_OBSERVED_NO_OMEGA_CREATED across all 6 (bucket x transcript) pairs.
Real FCE math does NOT coagulate: commit 12 verdict REAL_FCE_NO_COAGULATION across all 6 pairs; no OmegaRecord, no OmegaRegistry write, no ReferenceField, no agent.check_coagulation call.

section_3_technical_cause_probable.adapter_input_kind: deterministic SHA-256 hash of cycle_id, scaled by z_active
section_3_technical_cause_probable.missing_property_of_hash_vectors: no semantic alignment with agent's internal direction Phi_s
section_3_technical_cause_probable.consequence_for_I_t: assimilation fidelity stays small because E (Phi_s-projected excitation) is small relative to delta_X
section_3_technical_cause_probable.consequence_for_S_t: product collapses to ~0.13 max, ~0.01 mean despite high surrogate s_t
section_3_technical_cause_probable.why_surrogate_diverges_from_real: surrogate is arithmetic mean of three near-1 quantities; real is product of four where one factor (I_t) is near 0.1 due to absent semantic alignment
section_3_technical_cause_probable.interpretation: divergence is most plausibly an artifact of the missing semantic encoder, not a property of the data

section_4_cannot_be_claimed: No natural Omega; no OmegaRecord exists.
No production-loop proof; no production conversational input was driven through FceOmegaObserver.step on this branch.
No claim that operator-locked thresholds theta_s=0.28 / tau_coag=12 are wrong; the real-FCE failure to coagulate says inputs lack semantic fidelity, not that thresholds are mis-set.

section_5_what_comes_next.goal: test whether semantic alignment raises I_t enough for real FCE S_t to approach theta_s under the unchanged production temporal rule
constraints_carried_over_from_commit_12: no agent.check_coagulation call (use local audit rule)
new_constraints_specific_to_semantic_ada: field vectors must come from a real semantic encoder (production embedding pipeline read-only, or an equivalent encoder loaded only in the research process with the divergence from production marked)
vectors must be derived from actual transcript turn texts, not from cycle metadata
the temporal rule remains the local audit re-implementation; production check_coagulation untouched
section_5_what_comes_next.branching_decision_if_semantic_adapter_a: research line concludes surrogate-vs-real gap is fundamental to FCE-M product form on these workloads; alternative adapter design or new transcripts required
section_5_what_comes_next.branching_decision_if_semantic_adapter_O: operator's prerogative to design a separate production-loop test; out of scope for current research branch

L3-G1.notes: Conservation invariant + z_active < z_total on both runs.

L3-G2.notes: Within-run b_t recovery observed at surrogate and real-FCE levels; real-FCE did not recover above threshold.

L3-G4.notes: Buffer marks archived, never deletes; raw events recoverable.

L3-G5.notes: 125 surrogate signals (49 A + 76 B) all advisory_only=True.

L3-G6.notes: No check_coagulation call from research code (AST-verified). Vacuously satisfied.

L3-G9.notes: D/E/F/M/N benchmarks belong on main; research branch zero-diff for production paths.

L3-G10.notes: A and B replay with comparable surrogate distributions and pass the surrogate rule; real-FCE rule does NOT pass on either; without a real-FCE coagulation event the second-run reproducibility criterion cannot be evaluated. Unblocking requires the Semantic Vector Observation Adapter.

section_7_final_conclusion.headline: Positive research infrastructure; Level 3 not reached; next bottleneck is semantic assimilation fidelity I_t.
commits_summary: commits 2-7: deterministic projection / metabolism / summary / detector / harness pipeline; 143 tests pass
commit 10: formal A/B comparison + L3 gate audit
commit 11: surrogate-level controlled coagulation observation (verdict ISOLATED_RULE_OBSERVED_NO_OMEGA_CREATED)
commit 12: isolated real-FCE-M observation adapter (verdict REAL_FCE_NO_COAGULATION)
section_7_final_conclusion.key_finding: surrogate would-coagulate vs real-FCE no-coagulation gap; surrogate is feasibility geometry, not production rule pass; real FCE product form is more conservative on hash-derived field vectors
